job_title: Giảng viên Khoa học Máy tính (Core CS Lecturer)
required_skills: Master’s or PhD in Computer Science
Strong understanding of fundamental computer science principles
Proficient programming in C/C++ and Java
preferred_skills: Experience working at large software companies
Knowledge of Parallel Computing or Distributed Systems
key_responsibilities: Teach core CS courses such as Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, and Computer Architecture
Prepare and grade academic exams at the school level
Assist in developing a curriculum that meets international accreditation standards
